world_cues.reason: zone conditions, scarce resources, darkness and cold were rendered each tick

attention.reason: salience shifted around delay, practical work, and promise timing

appraisal.reason: characters read partial follow-through differently according to dispositions and relation state

state_update.reason: stress, mood, fatigue and some relation values changed across ticks

memory_activation.reason: existing continuity and prior imprints shaped readings of delay and competence, but no separate memory_imprints files were edited in this smoke run

relationship_dynamics.reason: trust, resentment and affinity shifted around promise delay, visible repair and compensation

action_pulls.reason: characters were pulled toward checking, repairing, assigning, and settling rather than dramatic escalation

notes: Baseline smoke/probe executed without episode injection.
Run stopped early because the shelter reached a stable overnight regime and further ticks likely would have been low-information drift.
unresolved_issues: No explicit campaign/run cast state mirror was updated beyond runtime world_state and logs; cast source files remain pre-run baselines.
Memory activation was used behaviorally from continuity and relation context, but not persisted back into memory_imprints.json during this smoke run.
